subject: Meeting Recap: Q2 Planning Sync — May 9, 2026
body_text:
Hi team,

Here are the recap notes from today's Q2 planning sync.

Attendees: Shubham Gaur (shubham.gaur@onixnet.com, organizer), Matteo Russo (matteo@airbyte.io, attendee)

Summary:
We discussed the roadmap for Q2 and aligned on the key deliverables for the Airbyte integration demo.

Topics discussed:
- Airbyte Cloud connector setup
- Memgraph graph schema
- Demo day preparation

Decisions:
- We decided to use Neon Postgres as the staging destination
- Agreed to target June 15 as the demo date

Action items:
- Action: Shubham to set up 4 Airbyte connectors by May 16. Owner: shubham.gaur@onixnet.com. Due: 2026-05-16. Priority: high
- Action: Matteo to share Airbyte webhook documentation. Owner: matteo@airbyte.io. Due: 2026-05-12. Priority: high

Next steps: Follow up in 1 week.

Best,
Shubham
